description_long: This object is a rectangular, box-like electronic device with a matte black exterior and a distinctive green cross or plus-shaped emblem centered on its top surface. The front face features two small rectangular buttons and a horizontal slot, suggesting it may be an entertainment or media device. The sides and back are plain, with no visible ports or controls, emphasizing a minimalist design. The overall construction appears solid and robust, likely made from plastic with internal metal components for structural support. The green emblem is the only notable color accent, standing out against the otherwise dark body. Its size and form factor suggest it is designed to rest on a flat surface, such as a shelf or entertainment center, in an urban environment.
description: A black, rectangular electronic device with a green cross emblem on top and a front panel featuring buttons and a slot. Its minimalist design and solid build suggest it is a media or entertainment appliance.
description_view_0: The top view shows the flat black surface with a centered green cross emblem, with no visible controls or ports.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the plain, featureless black surface, with the green emblem still visible on top.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the black body and green emblem, with no additional features.
description_view_3: The front view reveals two small buttons and a horizontal slot, indicating the interactive face of the device.
